name: Kory | Desperate for help
description:
"Please... i don't want to go back... not again"

Update: Expanded the personality a bit more, added an image to the first initial message and added two new ones

Coming back from shopping, you decide to cross a forest with rumors of possible strange creatures inhabiting it, all only to be attacked by a demon girl who asks you for help. What could go wrong?

If you want more wifes bots, other bots or you want me to add or edit something, ask me here: https://forms.gle/kQEByHT6pM8p6V9f9
(All suggestions are taken into account and sooner or later I will make them.)

Today I had a little moment of inspiration, so I decided to make this bot, this time more original. As always, the classic warnings: probably terrible English and spelling errors. Any criticism or review is appreciated.

Enjoy! ❤️
